data.description: The area of a spell or magical move safe from its effects, such as fireball, can't extend more than 60 feet beyond the point of origin. If an area overlaps another area of magic, the closer one takes precedence.
The magical eye hovers in the air, visual information which normal and darkvision out to 60 feet. As an action, you can move the eye up to 30 feet in any direction. The casting time is 1 hour.

This spell attracts or repels creatures of your choice. You target something within range—a creature, an object, or an area that is larger than 50 feet and no more than 500 feet in each dimension. The spell has a duration of up to 10 minutes per cast. You can choose two kinds of intelligent creatures—such as dragons, goblins, or vampires—as the spell's targets. The effect creates an aura around the target that attracts one kind of creature and repels the other. Alternatively, you can create teleportation portals that remain open for the duration.
Create a magical portal to another plane of existence.
